verse.name: V1
verse.lines: You gave me my hands To reach out to man To show him Your love And Your perfect plan You gave me my ears I can hear Your voice so clear I can hear the cries of sinners But can I wipe away their tears?

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Lord, I'm available to You My will, I give to You I'll do what You say to Use me Lord, to show someone the way And enable me to say My storage is empty And I am available to You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Now I'm giving back to You All the tools You gave to me My hands, my ears, my voice, my eyes So You can use them as You please I have emptied out my cup So that You can fill me up Now, I'm free, I just want to be More available to You

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord, I'm available to You My will, I give to You I'll do what You say do Use me Lord, to show someone the way And enable me to say My storage is empty And I am available to You

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: My storage is empty Our storage is empty Our storage is empty And we are available to You We are available to You
